name: A feasting hall
description:
This is a massive feasting hall.  Dozens of long tables and chairs occupy the
hall.  A stage is in one corner, providing a place for entertainers to perform.
Aforetime this hall was often packed with many merry-making elves but the
festivities have dwindled with the population of the Grey Havens.  It seems the
elves believe they will find greater bliss on the other side of the sea.  
There is a counter here with a menu.
